name: GraniteShares 1x Short GAFAM Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 1x Short GAFAM Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) designed to provide investors with a daily return equivalent to -1 times the daily performance of an index representing the GAFAM stocks (Google, Apple, Facebook, Amazon, Microsoft). The ETC offers a leveraged inverse exposure to these large technology stocks. It is based in London, UK.
